Merged via PR #31 — final PoC critical-path bead
sample_app merged via PR #32 — last v0.5 PoC bead. Stack is whole: host binding + harness + CLI + DevTools (4 panels) + 3 reference plugins + 3 providers + LoopHost wiring + dogfooding sample app.

ExplorationBinding.run(ExplorationApp) entry point merged via PR #33. Sample_app boots cleanly; install-ordering bug fixed. PRD §6.1/§6.5 amended. ensureInitialized(plugins:) preserved unchanged for tests/advanced use.
DevTools extension build script + CI wiring merged via PR #34. tool/build_devtools_extension.sh produces both bundles in one shot; CI rebuilds on every PR; .gitignore policy unchanged.
Hot-fix landed direct to main: main.dart wraps child in Builder so serviceManager reads happen below DevToolsExtension. Bundle rebuilt; analyze clean.
Built docs/build-story.html — self-contained scrollytelling page from git+bd history

Fixed. lenny's .claude/skills/ + .claude/agents/ were already updated to fs 0.6.0 (spec-readiness@v2 rubric set, 6 rubrics, critique/deliberate/factory skills, 4 agents). Remaining gaps closed:
- fs 0.6.0's `fs deliberate` resolves the rubric set from `<repo-root>/skills/deliberate/references/rubric-set.json` (top-level skills/, not .claude/skills/), and the /critique subagent prompts read `skills/critique/references/<rubric>.md` relative to the repo root. Added `skills -> .claude/skills` and `agents -> .claude/agents` symlinks at the repo root so there is one source of truth (commit c2660cf). `fs deliberate lenny-93o` now emits all 6 critique envelopes.
- `committee_review` is in `status.custom` (was added as a stopgap `bd config set`; the fs migration set 0001-0003 does not add it — see the factoryskills bug filed for this). All migrations applied.

lenny-93o is now gradeable — run `/deliberate lenny-93o` (or `/factory`) from a lenny-cwd session to resume the cascade.

Filed upstream in factoryskills:
- fs deliberate / critique rubric-path resolution doesn't match where fs init installs (`.claude/skills/`) — consuming projects need a top-level skills/ or a symlink; fs should resolve like the agent loader.
- Missing migration: nothing adds `committee_review` to status.custom for projects upgrading from pre-committee fs.

Merged to main (squash, direct strategy). VmServiceClient.fromVmService / ExplorationSession.fromVmService land the web-safe wiring; panel reuses serviceManager's VmService. 228 agent + 131 devtools tests pass, analyze clean. AC4 (dogfood Chrome screenshot) is the remaining manual check. Follow-up: lenny-sw6 (vm_service_io CLI-only seam). Note: branch worktree was force-removed mid-merge during a beads-jsonl rebase conflict; merge completed manually.
All four children landed (cvl.1 handshake, cvl.2 observation, cvl.3 action exec, cvl.4 e2e integration test). Wire contract reconciled and regression-guarded by the new flutter_test.
Tracking rig bead — stays closed; health label updated by launchagent via bd set-state.

All 7 children merged. exploration_agent is Flutter-free: exploration_flutter/flutter_test/exploration_cli removed from pubspec, 3 test files converted to pure-Dart via ExplorationVmServiceFake, no-Flutter guard added, dart test packages/exploration_agent green (286 tests, one runner). The exploration_agent ⇄ exploration_flutter circular dependency is broken.

Filed on a misdiagnosis. The '200 chars/sec' test in web_compat_and_perf_test.dart passes (verified in isolation on main and the lenny-n6n branch) and is NOT the suite failure — I misread a cumulative flutter-test progress counter. The real failure is web_wiring_test.dart; see the replacement bead.

Fixed in 9b74041 (pushed to main). Stale test: _FakeVmService in web_wiring_test.dart asserted the handshake extension name without the .core. segment; corrected to ext.flutter.exploration.core.handshake. Full exploration_devtools package verified green (148/148, --exclude-tags=perf as CI runs it).
Fixed and verified live: stale model id corrected to qwen3.6-35b-a3b-8bit; buildPluginTools now namespace-prefixes tool names. Live CLI run progressed past both errors.
Fixed and verified live: stale model id corrected to qwen3.6-35b-a3b-8bit; buildPluginTools now namespace-prefixes tool names. Live CLI run progressed past both errors.

Fixed directly: added tool_choice:{type:any} to AnthropicModelProvider.decide so Claude is forced to emit a tool_use block every turn. Original 'observation schema drift' diagnosis was wrong (see correction comment) — the observation pipeline works; the bug was the missing tool_choice. Fixed outside the factory because an Anthropic API 529 outage blocked the factory's Claude-powered subagents; user authorized direct unblocking. 14 anthropic provider tests pass, analyze clean.

Added onCallDiagnostics callback to AnthropicModelProvider.decide() — fires once per HTTP call (success AND failure) with provider, model, duration_ms, http_status, stop_reason, tool_use, ok, error. provider_factory threads it; the CLI writes a '[model] ...' line to stderr per call. Verified live: every call logs e.g. '[model] anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 http=200 dur=2143ms stop=tool_use tool_use=true ok=true'. 16 anthropic provider tests pass (2 new). An API outage is now visible in run output instead of inferred.
Landed via PR #43 → main 90e30f3. Full chat-shape rebuild + vision restored; legacy v1 path removed.
